data.body: EPIC 5ca8 CLOSED: completion-verifier PASS (signed at sha 9450d0462, full main). Required REBAR_LLM_MAX_STEPS=600 — the default 240 exhausted on an 11-child epic (known gate step-budget defect). All 11 children closed via signed completion-verifier; PRs #82 (self-waltz-ace), #83 (unfed-liner-arson), #84 (hush-quail-holm), #85 (foamy-gem-skip) all merged to main. Epic-close constraints verified: new split modules >=100 LOC; applier.py+outbound_differ.py off the allowlist (reconcile kept); CI green (lean lane, mcp/grounding installs, CodeQL).
